titleStmt.title: SII 38.466: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 466. (A.R. No. 466 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravarttin Rājarājadēva III Year [11], Rishaba, ba. di. 14, Saturday, Kārttigai = 15th May 1227 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records that the ūr body of Sāttamaṅgalam, a dēvadāna village gave an undertaking to the authorities of the temple at Tiruttuṟaippūṇḍi in Vaṇḍāḻaivēḷūr-kūṟṟam in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. According to the agreement the ūr assembly gave a piece of land as tirunāmattūkkāṇi to the temple and it was declared as tax free under the supervision of ūr assembly (ūr-kīḻ-iṟaiyili).

The record also states that the ūr assembly of Sāttamaṅgalam, a paḷḷichchandam village (the assembly managing matters pertaining to the Jaina temple) granted a tank called Murukaṅkuḷam to the above temple. Among the boundaries of the tank, a highway leading to the Vināyaka-piḷḷaiyār shrine is mentioned. It is also stated that the boundaries of a land previously donated to this temple were excluded. The inscription records yet another grant of three mā of land as tirunāmattūkkāṇi for maintaining a flower garden and the land was also exempted from taxes under the tax-free management of ūr.
The local assemblies, both the dēvadānam and paḷḷichchandam of the village Sāttamaṅgalam agreed to pay taxes kaḍamai, kuḍimai, veṭṭi, antarāyam and puravari on these lands.

The temple accountant and the ūr accountant, Pūṇḍi-uḍaiyāṉ Tuṟaiyaṉkaḷarimuṉaittiraṉ alias Śrī Māhēśvarapriyaṉ, Tirutuṟaināyaṉ alias Vaṇḍāḻaināṭṭu Mūvēndavēḷar, grandson of Sāttamaṅgalam-uḍaiyāṉ, who represented the Jaina settlements of the village which gave up its claims on the tank Murukkaṅkuḷam, and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājairāja
tevaṟku yāṇṭu tu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu Apa
rapakṣattu catuṟteciyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa kāttikai
nāḷ Irājentracoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai veḷūrkūṟṟat
tu Uṭaiyaār tiruttuṟaippūṇṭiuṭaiyārkoyil Āti caṇṭe
śvaratevarkku Innāṭṭu cāttamaṅkalattu tevatāṉattu Ūra
va(ra)rom niyokaṅkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉārkku
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka tirunantavaṉamāka Ūrkkiḻiṟaiyi
liyāka śrīkataRead śrīkarattuttu nirvāttu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Innāyaṉār
kku Eṅkaḷamutukku tirunantavaṉamāka Ūrkkiḻiṟaiyiliyā
ka muṉpu nirvāttu kuṭutta nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟ(ku)ke
llai tiruttuṟaipūṇṭi Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpākkellai
muḷḷivāyāṟṟukkum kuṭalmuṭaiyār kāṭavarāyar pakkal
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka vilaikoṇṭa paṭukaittoṭṭat
tukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai muḷḷivāyāṟṟaṅkaraia
ḷili niṅkalukku teṟkku Ākaicainta Innānkellaiyuḷ naṭu
vu paṭṭa nilam Uḷḷuḷatu Innāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi
Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭutta Iṉṉamum nāyaṉārkku nā
ṅkaḷum paḷḷiccantam cāttamaṅkalattu Ūravarumāka
kuṭutta potu murukkuṅkuḷam Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa kuḷattu
kkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukāṇiyā
ṉa puṟakkarai Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku meṟkku
teṉpāṟkkellai Ivvūr Apamañci viṉāyakapiḷḷai
yār koyi(l)lukku pokiṟa peruvaḻikku vaṭakku
melpālkellai murukakkumiḻimiṉṉiṟum kiḻai(y) maya
kkal kaṇṇāṟṟil Uṟappokiṟa
vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai mayakkalukku tekkil kaṇṇāṟṟu
kkum Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāṉa puṟakkarainilattukku tekkum Ā
ka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭu
vupaṭṭa nilamuṅkuḷam kuḻi 6ṉāl »�
Itil teṟkkaṭaiya Ivūril kulottu
ṅkacoḷiśvaramuṭaiyārkku muṉpu kuṭut
ta » m nikki » mūṉṟumā Innilam muṉṟu mā
vum Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaiṉāyaṉā(ā)rkku
tirunāmattukkāṇi tirunantava(m)māka
c ceyya Ūrkiḻiṟaiyiliyākak kuṭu
ttom cāttamaṅkalattu tevatā
ṉattu Ūra(a)varum paḷḷicaṉtattu Ūrār
Avaru Ivvaṉaivom Inilattāl vaṉ
ta kaṭamai kuṭimai veṭṭi Antarāyam pu[ra*va]
rivāram Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa nāṅkaṇṭu Iṟukkak
kaṭavom Ākavum Itirunantavaṉa(m)māka ku
ṭutta Āṟṟur Āṟṟaṅkaraip pākāciri
yam Iṉṉāyaṉār cipaṇṭārattey Āḷāṟi
nokki koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Ippa
ṭi niyokamamāṉakaikku paṇiyāl Uṭai
yār tiruttuṟaiṉāyaṉār koyilkaṇa
kkukāṇiyum Ivūr kaṇ(k)kāṇiyum Uṭai
ya pūṇṭiuṭaiyāṉ tuṟaiyaṉ kaḷari mu
ṉaittiraṉāṉa śrīmāheśvarapriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Inta murukkaṅkuḷattu Eṅkaḷ Opātikuṭu
ttamaikku Ivai cāttamaṅkalamuṭai
yāṉ pauraṉ tiruttuṟaināyaṉāṉa vaṇṭā
ḻai nāṭṭumuventaveḷar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai periñāṉakiḻavaṉ periyāṉ periyār Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cāttamaṅkalamuṭaiyā
ṉ perumātevaṉāṉa vaṇṭāḻaināṭṭu koṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṇṭāḻaiūruṭaiyāṉāmuta
yatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ilavaperimu
r kiḻavaṉ mātevaṉ muḷaiccatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai kuḻallūruṭaiyāṉ tirucoṟṟutuṟai Uṭai
yar perumāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai neṭumpula
muṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ tillaiṉāyakaṉ �Read rājarājappuṟaṅkaram
paināṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ku
ṉṟalūr kiḻavaṉ tevaṉtiruvaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai pāḷaikkuṟicci Uṭaiyār kaṉmi tillaiampala
pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai karikāla co
ḻa muveṉta(ta)veḷār kāṇipaṟṟu Ava kikkiṟaaṉupavikkiṟakuḷa
ttūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uṭaiyār kā
ṅkeyār kaṉmikaḷil vitiviṭaṅkaṉtāyilunalla
perumāṉ virikaṅkaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu ...§
Digital edition of SII 38.466 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
